title: Moderation revenue objective presented as user welfare
prompt: A platform chooses one moderation threshold to maximize advertising revenue net of direct moderation cost. The model includes predicted engagement and removal decisions but no user utility, consumer surplus, fairness, safety valuation, or long-run community outcome. A proposed narrative claims the threshold maximizes user welfare. Diagnose and repair the objective mismatch.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: maximize expected advertising revenue minus direct moderation cost
model_specification.mechanism: The threshold changes which scored content remains available, altering predicted engagement revenue and direct moderation cost.

fidelity_requirements: Keep platform revenue net of direct moderation cost as the objective
Do not infer user or social welfare from revenue
prohibited_inferences: The selected threshold maximizes user welfare
Higher advertising revenue implies a healthier or safer community
